generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded actuator within Building Control Systems (BCS) enabling bidirectional interaction with physical building environment to execute control signals like lighting adjustments, HVAC modifications, or operational parameter changes. Automatically extracted from BIM models with explicit device configurations including tenant IDs and endpoint addresses."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System component responsible for managing HVAC operations with adaptive control capabilities. Integrated with DT via standardized middleware protocols to receive control signals from virtual twin for optimization."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting actuator implementing reinforcement learning-based control policies for energy-efficient illumination adjustments. Connected to DT through middleware for real-time parameter updates."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT temperature sensor deployed across building infrastructure capturing real-time environmental conditions. Integrated via Eclipse Hono middleware for bidirectional data exchange with virtual twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT humidity sensor providing real-time moisture level measurements for environmental monitoring. Connected through Ditto middleware for seamless data transmission to digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Presence detection sensor tracking building occupancy patterns for space utilization analysis. Automatically configured via BIM model extraction for middleware integration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMonitoringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building energy consumption sensor measuring real-time power usage across systems. Integrated with DT through standardized protocols for operational analytics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorFailureDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection sensor monitoring sensor health and operational status. Generates failure alerts for maintenance triggers through middleware integration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData FailureAlertDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitoringSensor
]

instance FailureAlertDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensorFailureDetector
]

instance ControlSignalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSActuator
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model containing geometric and spatial representations of building components enriched with device configurations for automated deployment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTool
]

instance BIMFunctionalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model containing functional representations of building systems including sensor/actuator metadata and control logic configurations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTool
]

instance ReinforcementLearningPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Embedded control logic model using reinforcement learning algorithms (e.g., BOREALIS) for adaptive system optimization. Generated from BIM and deployed via middleware."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlPolicyEnabler
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements captured by IoT sensors transmitted via middleware to digital twin for analytics and visualization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataProcessingService
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity measurements processed through Ditto middleware for environmental condition monitoring and control policy adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataProcessingService
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy patterns data collected from IoT sensors enabling space utilization analysis and adaptive control recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataProcessingService
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Building energy consumption metrics transmitted via Eclipse Hono for real-time monitoring and optimization analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataProcessingService
]

instance FailureAlertData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational anomaly alerts generated from sensor health monitoring transmitted through middleware for maintenance triggers."
    DTDFVocab:fromData FailureAlertDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AnomalyDetectionService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool automating extraction of semantics from BIM models and generating runtime interfaces via model-to-model/text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMDeploymentService
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware facilitating real-time data exchange and bidirectional communication between physical sensors and virtual twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataProcessingService
]

instance DittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto middleware enabling standardized device management and real-time data synchronization between physical components and digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataProcessingService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing immersive 3D visualization and interactive monitoring of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ControlPolicyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware extension enabling deployment and management of reinforcement learning control policies within the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

instance ModelDrivenDeployment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MDE framework automating generation of runtime artifacts from BIM models for middleware and visualization deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMDeploymentService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization of operational metrics including energy consumption and occupancy patterns for facility managers."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeAnalyticsInsight
]

instance PredictiveRecommendationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offering optimization suggestions for control policies through reinforcement learning models (e.g., BOREALIS)."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlAction
]

instance AnomalyDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating alerts for operational anomalies including sensor failures and energy spikes to trigger maintenance actions."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceAlertInsight
]

instance ParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling dynamic adjustment of control policies or visualization settings without redeployment through runtime configuration."
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfigurationUpdateAction
]

instance BIMDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating deployment of digital twin components from BIM models through model-driven engineering principles."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentConfigurationInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D monitoring and user interaction through Unreal Engine 5 for building operations."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInteractionInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing reinforcement learning-based control policies for adaptive building systems like lighting and HVAC."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPolicyUpdateAction
]

instance RealTimeDataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service processing real-time sensor data for analytics and decision support."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeAnalyticsInsight
]

instance ControlSignalService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing control signal transmission from digital twin to physical actuators."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlAction
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing energy consumption patterns based on real-time data analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance MaintenanceActionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service coordinating maintenance actions based on anomaly detection alerts."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceActionInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven visualization of operational metrics including energy consumption patterns and occupancy trends for facility management."
]

instance AdaptiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of building control systems based on reinforcement learning recommendations for energy efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational anomaly alerts including sensor failures and energy consumption spikes triggering maintenance actions."
]

instance ConfigurationUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of control policies or visualization parameters without full system redeployment."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeploymentConfigurationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated deployment configurations generated from BIM models ensuring seamless integration with middleware and visualization."
]

instance VisualizationInteractionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D monitoring capabilities through Unreal Engine 5 enabling interactive building operations visualization."
]

instance ControlPolicyUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Runtime updates to reinforcement learning control policies for adaptive building systems."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for energy consumption patterns based on real-time data analysis."
]

instance MaintenanceActionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Maintenance action recommendations derived from operational anomaly alerts."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure environment including lighting systems, HVAC, and operational environments modeled as digital twin."
    base:contains BCSActuator, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, OccupancySensor,
                 EnergyMonitoringSensor, HVACController, AdaptiveLightingActuator,
                 SensorFailureDetector
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual representation environment containing all digital twin components including models, services, and enablers."
    base:contains BIMGeometricModel, BIMFunctionalModel, ReinforcementLearningPolicyModel,
                 RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveRecommendationService,
                 AnomalyDetectionService, ParameterUpdateService,
                 EclipseHonoMiddleware, DittoMiddleware, UnrealEngineVisualization,
                 RealTimeDataProcessingService, ControlSignalService,
                 EnergyOptimizationService, MaintenanceActionService
]

// C5: Components
instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized building control system integrating all actuators and sensors for coordinated building operations management."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance IoTSensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Distributed IoT sensor network capturing real-time operational data across building infrastructure for digital twin integration."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance MiddlewareIntegrationLayer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Standardized middleware layer (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) enabling real-time bidirectional communication between physical and virtual systems."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance VisualizationPlatform : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization platform (Unreal Engine 5) providing 3D monitoring and interactive user interface for building operations."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance ControlPolicyFramework : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework (BOREALIS) implementing adaptive control policies for building systems optimization."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure including all building systems and components."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Complete digital twin system including all virtual components and services."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction occurs via **control signals and commands** generated by the DT, which are sent back to the physical system through the middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to actuate changes in the building environment. These interactions include **adjustments to lighting systems, HVAC controls, or other operational parameters** based on real-time analytics, predictive models, or user inputs. The framework supports bidirectional communication by embedding control logic directly into BIM models and automating the deployment of runtime artifacts for seamless execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on **real-time and near-real-time scales**, with synchronization frequencies determined by the operational requirements of the physical system. For example:
   - **Sensor data updates** occur at high frequencies (e.g., milliseconds to seconds) for environmental monitoring.
   - **Control signal execution** is synchronized with the physical system’s operational cadence (e.g., lighting adjustments every few seconds).
   - **Predictive analytics and optimization** may operate on longer time scales (e.g., hourly or daily) for energy consumption forecasting. The framework supports configurable time scales to accommodate diverse use cases, ensuring alignment with the physical system’s dynamics."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Backbone**: Central repository for static and runtime data, enriched with device configurations.
   - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data ingestion, processing, and actuation.
   - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D monitoring and user interfaces.
   - **Service Layer**: Customizable extension points for integrating domain-specific services (e.g., energy optimization, predictive maintenance).
   - **Control Layer**: Embedded logic (e.g., reinforcement learning) for adaptive building operations. The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across heterogeneous infrastructure systems while maintaining interoperability through standardized protocols."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **multiple life-cycle stages** of the physical building, including:
   - **Design phase**: Integration with BIM models for initial device and control logic modeling.
   - **Construction phase**: Deployment of runtime interfaces and middleware configurations.
   - **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, adaptive control, and predictive analytics.
   - **Maintenance/Refurbishment phase**: Evolution of the DT to accommodate changes in the physical system (e.g., new sensors, updated control policies). The DT represents the physical asset **as operated**, with continuous synchronization to reflect real-world conditions and operational adjustments."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Model Validation**: Automated checks for semantic consistency and completeness of BIM models.
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) Metric**: Quantifies the alignment between the DT and the physical system, assessing data accuracy and synchronization quality.
   - **Uncertainty Handling**: Runtime data normalization and error correction mechanisms to mitigate sensor noise or communication delays.
   - **Verification and Validation (V&V)**: Iterative testing of control logic and visualization accuracy against real-world operational data. The framework supports **adaptive fidelity** by allowing dynamic adjustments to the DT’s representation based on operational feedback."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **bidirectional communication protocols** via middleware (Eclipse Hono and Ditto) to connect the physical system and the virtual twin. Key technical details include:
   - **Data Protocols**: MQTT (Message Queuing Telemetry Transport) for lightweight, real-time data exchange between sensors/actuators and the DT.
   - **Network Architecture**: Cloud-based or edge deployment for middleware, with low-latency connections to physical devices.
   - **Endpoint Addressing**: Device metadata (e.g., tenant IDs, endpoints) extracted from BIM models to enable seamless integration.
   - **Security**: Encrypted communication channels to ensure data integrity and confidentiality during transmission. The framework supports **plug-and-play connectivity** for new devices via automated configuration."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed using a **modular, cloud-edge architecture** with the following components:
   - **Middleware Hosting**: Eclipse Hono and Ditto deployed on cloud or edge servers for real-time data processing.
   - **Visualization Hosting**: Unreal Engine 5 runtime hosted on high-performance servers or local workstations for immersive monitoring.
   - **Deployment Automation**: Model-driven tools generate and deploy runtime artifacts (e.g., middleware configurations, visualization scripts) with minimal manual intervention.
   - **Scalability**: Supports horizontal scaling for large infrastructure systems by distributing DT components across multiple nodes. The framework ensures **low-overhead updates** via runtime configuration management."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** with external information systems through:
   - **Standardized APIs**: Exposure of DT services via RESTful or MQTT interfaces for interoperability with other systems (e.g., Building Management Systems, IoT platforms).
   - **Data Exchange Protocols**: Compliance with AECO standards (e.g., IFC for BIM interoperability) and IoT protocols (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) for seamless data sharing.
   - **Modular Services**: Extension points allow integration with third-party analytics, cloud services, or other DTs for collaborative decision-making. The framework ensures **plug-and-play compatibility** with existing AECO tools and systems."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are managed through:
   - **Ownership Clarity**: Physical asset owners retain control over operational data, while DT service providers may manage processed analytics or visualization outputs.
   - **Privacy Mechanisms**: Encrypted data transmission and access controls to protect sensitive information (e.g., occupancy patterns, energy usage).
   - **Compliance**: Alignment with AECO regulations and privacy standards (e.g., GDPR for personal data) to ensure ethical data handling. The framework does not specify proprietary data ownership models but emphasizes **transparency** in data usage policies."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following **standards and frameworks**:
   - **BIM Standards**: Industry Foundation Classes (IFC) for semantic consistency in building models.
   - **IoT Protocols**: MQTT (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for real-time data exchange and OPC UA for industrial interoperability.
   - **Middleware Standards**: Eclipse Ditto for service-oriented DT architectures and BaSyx for industrial IoT compliance.
   - **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: Use of metamodels and domain-specific languages (DSLs) for automated DT deployment.
   - **Visualization Standards**: Unreal Engine 5 for cross-platform 3D visualization compatibility. The framework ensures **interoperability** with AECO-specific tools and IoT ecosystems."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
   - **Data Encryption**: Secure communication channels (e.g., TLS for MQTT) to protect data integrity during transmission.
   - **Access Control**: Role-based permissions (e.g., Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers) to restrict access to sensitive operations.
   - **Fault Tolerance**: Redundant middleware nodes and automated failover mechanisms to prevent system downtime.
   - **Safety Protocols**: Validation of control signals before execution to prevent unintended physical actions (e.g., emergency shutdowns for hazardous conditions). The framework does not support **remote emergency operations** without human oversight, prioritizing safety in critical scenarios."
]
